name: onekgpd
tagline: Wraps a public 1000 Genomes Project genomics API for per-individual variant, sample, and kinship queries.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped skill: no credentials used, network egress is disclosed and matches its stated purpose, and it repeatedly warns the caller to verify coordinates before querying.
